user_query: I'm curious about my genetic traits and my Neanderthal ancestry proportion. Can you fetch the traits and Neanderthal analysis for my 23andMe profile? Additionally, provide me with the version metadata of the Hapihub server.

TaskList.description: Fetch genetic traits from the 23andMe profile.
Retrieve Neanderthal ancestry analysis from the 23andMe profile.
Get the version metadata from the Hapihub server.
